testcase.name: [1:24] POST /pet - Create new pet with complete data structure
[2:52] GET /pet/{petId} - Retrieve pet by unique identifier
[3:88] PUT /pet - Update existing pet data and business status
[4:130] GET /pet/findByStatus - Query pets by business status filter
